name: prism-gen-demo
description: PRISM-Gen molecular screening data analysis tool. Retrieve, filter, sort, merge, and visualize multi-stage pipeline results from the PRISM-Gen broad-spectrum coronavirus Mpro inhibitor discovery framework.
author: SenaZeng

skills.name: retrieve
skills.description: Retrieve and display data from any pipeline stage CSV (step3a through step5b).

skills.name: filter
skills.description: Filter molecules by property thresholds (pIC50, QED, MW, LogP, gap_ev, hERG_Prob, etc.).

skills.name: sort
skills.description: Sort and rank molecules by any column (Reward, R_global, Broad_Spectrum_Score, pIC50, etc.).

skills.name: merge
skills.description: Merge/join data across pipeline stages on SMILES keys.

skills.name: score
skills.description: Compute composite scores, multi-target worst-case analysis, and summarize key metrics.

skills.name: plot
skills.description: Generate visualizations: histograms, scatter plots, heatmaps, funnel charts, Pareto fronts.

skills.name: summary
skills.description: Generate a full pipeline summary report with attrition statistics and key findings.
